hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then ruff check --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 && ruff format "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'src/flow_matching/'; then module=$(basename "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" .py); test_file="tests/test_${module}.py"; [ -f "$test_file" ] && uv run pytest "$test_file" -x -q 2>&1 | tail -5; fi
